vulnerabilities.description: HTML comment discloses a testing account ('test:test'): <!-- TODO: Delete the testing account (test:test). -->, indicating likely valid default credentials and potential auth bypass.
Different error messages for invalid username vs wrong password (e.g., 'Invalid username.' vs 'Wrong password.') allow enumeration of valid usernames.
Login form lacks a CSRF token, enabling cross-site login or credential stuffing from a third-party origin.
Session cookie is issued without Secure and SameSite attributes (only HttpOnly present), increasing risk of CSRF and exposure over non-HTTPS.
